caption: We've all been there - staring into a nearly empty pantry wondering what to make. But before you reach for that takeaway menu, remember that eggs and bread are a match made in culinary heaven! Swipe through to discover 5 delicious meals you can make with just these two simple ingredients. No need to dash to the shops! Want more pantry-saving ideas? Download Peppera for hundreds of recipes that work with what you already have. #PantryChaos
hooks: Got eggs and bread? You've got 5 incredible meals!
Pantry feeling empty? These eggs & bread combos will save dinner!
When your fridge is bare except for eggs and bread...
platform_notes: Instagram carousel post with 8 slides. Use a friendly, slightly humorous tone throughout. Make sure each recipe slide is clearly visualized with 2D cartoon illustrations showing the finished dish.

generation_request.notes: Pillar: pantry chaos. Ingredients: eggs, bread.

slides.image_prompt: 2D cartoon style: A cheerful cartoon mascot holding eggs and bread with a surprised/excited expression. Background shows an empty pantry. Whimsical cooking elements floating around.
slides.text: 5 MESS-FREE MEALS USING JUST EGGS & BREAD!

slides.image_prompt: 2D cartoon style: The same cartoon mascot looking worried in front of an empty fridge, except for eggs and bread on a shelf. Bubble thought showing food delivery apps with high prices.
slides.text: PANTRY CHAOS: When you're hungry but the fridge is nearly empty...

slides.image_prompt: 2D cartoon style: Golden brown French toast slices on a plate with a dollop of butter and maple syrup dripping down. Mascot peeking from the side giving a thumbs up.

steps: Whisk egg, milk, and cinnamon in a bowl
Dip bread slices in mixture, coating both sides
Melt butter in pan over medium heat
Cook bread for 2-3 minutes each side until golden
recipe.proTip: Use stale bread for best results - it soaks up the egg mixture better!

slides.image_prompt: 2D cartoon style: A slice of toast with a perfectly round fried egg in the center, sunny side up. Mascot holding the toast with both hands looking delighted.

steps: Cut a 3-inch circle in the middle of the bread
Butter both sides of the bread
Place bread in pan over medium heat, crack egg into the hole
Cook for 2-3 minutes, then flip and cook until egg reaches desired doneness
recipe.proTip: Fry the cut-out circle too for a mini toast to dip in your egg yolk!

slides.image_prompt: 2D cartoon style: A flat, round bread omelette with visible egg and bread pieces mixed together, golden brown. Mascot sprinkling cheese on top with a grin.

ingredients: 2 slices of bread, torn into pieces
steps: Beat eggs with milk, salt, and pepper
Stir in bread pieces and half the cheese
Melt butter in pan, pour in mixture
Cook until set, then sprinkle remaining cheese on top and fold
recipe.proTip: Let the bread soak in the egg mixture for 5 minutes before cooking for extra fluffiness!

slides.image_prompt: 2D cartoon style: A small savory bread pudding in a ramekin, golden brown with a slightly puffed top. Mascot holding a fork and about to take a bite.

steps: Preheat oven to 180°C
Beat eggs, milk, salt, and pepper in a bowl
Mix bread cubes, cheese, and onions in a baking dish
Pour egg mixture over bread, let sit for 10 minutes, then bake for 30 minutes until golden
recipe.proTip: Day-old bread works best for this recipe!

slides.image_prompt: 2D cartoon style: A layered strata in a glass dish showing distinct layers of bread and egg mixture, baked to perfection with cheese on top. Mascot slicing a portion with a knife.

steps: Grease a baking dish and layer half the bread cubes
Sprinkle with half the cheese and season with salt and pepper
Repeat layers with remaining bread and cheese
Whisk eggs and milk, pour over layers, drizzle with melted butter, then bake at 180°C for 40-45 minutes until set
recipe.proTip: Prepare this the night before and refrigerate - the flavors will be even better!

slides.image_prompt: 2D cartoon style: The mascot holding a phone showing the Peppera app, surrounded by all 5 egg and bread dishes in a circle around them. Mascot is pointing to the download button on the screen.
slides.text: Hungry for more meal-saving ideas? Download Peppera now to discover hundreds of recipes that use what's already in your pantry!
